nodes.label: Simulation IPC Communication Module Used for inter-process communication between
Simulation IPC Client (Used by Flask end)          Used to send commands to the
Initialize IPC Client                  Args:             simulation_dir: Simulat
Send command and wait for response                  Args:             command_ty
Send single Agent interview command                  Args:             agent_id:
Send batch interview command                  Args:             interviews: Inte
Send close environment command                  Args:             timeout: Timeo
Check if simulation environment is alive                  Judged by checking env
Simulation IPC Server (Used by simulation script end)          Polls command dir
Initialize IPC Server                  Args:             simulation_dir: Simulat
Poll command directory, return first pending command                  Returns:
Send response                  Args:             response: IPC Response
